# Pull Request

## Description

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

- [ ] `01-aws-api-interaction`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Fix — corrects an error in instructions, script, or config
- [ ] Improvement — improves clarity or adds missing detail
- [ ] New content — adds a new lab or module

## Checklist

- [ ] README is updated if instructions changed
- [ ] Python scripts follow PEP 8 style
- [ ] Markdown passes markdownlint
- [ ] Steps are reproducible from a clean environment
